instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect uphill driving conditions.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall identify uphill condition when Road_Gradient exceeds Uphill_Threshold.

expected_output: IF Road_Gradient > Uphill_Threshold THEN Hill_Mode = Uphill
IF Road_Gradient <= Uphill_Threshold THEN Hill_Mode = Normal
